# 获取公众号原创文章数

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/original_article_count:
    post:
      summary: 获取公众号原创文章数
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        该接口获取的是实时数据，非数据库陈旧数据。


        |                 状态码                 |                        
        说明                         |

        |:-----------------------------------:|:--------------------------------------------------:|

        | {"message":"Internal Server Error"} |                   
        网络错误，请重试1~3次                    |

        |                  0                  |                        
        成功                         |

        |                 -1                  |             
        QPS超过上限，不得高于2次/秒，请5秒后再试！              |

        |                 100                 |            缺少参数             |

        |             101             |    请检查文章链接    |



        ### 返回结果

        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        | ['AccountInfo'] | 账号信息 |

        | ['AccountInfo']['UserName'] | 原始id |

        | ['AccountInfo']['ServiceType'] | 1服务号  0订阅号公众号 |

        | ['AccountInfo']['NickName'] | 公众号名字 |

        | ['AccountInfo']['HeadImgUrl'] | 公众号头像 |

        |['BaseInfo']['OriginalArticleCount']|原创文章数|

        | ['HasArtile'] | 是否有文章 |

        | ['code'] | 错误代码  0 成功 |

        | ['cost'] | 消费 |

        | ['remain_money'] | 余额 |
      tags:
        - 公众号账号搜索和账号基本信息
      parameters:
        - name: Content-Type
          in: header
          description: ''
          required: false
          example: application/json
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                url:
                  type: string
                  description: 微信文章链接，原始id任选其一
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了官网 key（1.0元/次）
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 附加码，如设置了附加码verifycode，则此参数为必选，如未设置则为非必选
                ghid:
                  type: string
                  description: 原始id ， 微信文章链接 任选其一
              x-apifox-orders:
                - ghid
                - url
                - key
                - verifycode
              description: json
              required:
                - key
            example:
              ghid: gh_d690baa54b14
              url: ''
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  AccountInfo:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      UserName:
                        type: string
                        description: 原始id
                      ServiceType:
                        type: integer
                        description: 1服务号  0订阅号公众号
                      NickName:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号名字
                      HeadImgUrl:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号头像
                    required:
                      - UserName
                      - ServiceType
                      - NickName
                      - HeadImgUrl
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - UserName
                      - ServiceType
                      - NickName
                      - HeadImgUrl
                    description: 账号信息
                  BaseInfo:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      OriginalArticleCount:
                        type: integer
                        description: 原创文章数
                      OriginalContentStr:
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - OriginalArticleCount
                      - OriginalContentStr
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - OriginalArticleCount
                      - OriginalContentStr
                  HasArtile:
                    type: boolean
                    description: 是否有文章
                  code:
                    type: integer
                    description: 错误代码  0 成功
                  cost:
                    type: number
                    description: 消费
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                    description: 余额
                required:
                  - AccountInfo
                  - BaseInfo
                  - HasArtile
                  - code
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - AccountInfo
                  - BaseInfo
                  - HasArtile
                  - code
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
              example:
                AccountInfo:
                  UserName: gh_92d8a23892cb
                  ServiceType: 0
                  NickName: 智药邦
                  HeadImgUrl: >-
                    http://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/INk4JvWfe8XmTgeibkWf2d132YKPJTtN2ldUTK5gP7RuNrDxfjZ8gzArVicVic0cEuQIUdYW7llgl4/0
                BaseInfo:
                  OriginalArticleCount: 822
                  OriginalContentStr: 822篇原创内容
                HasArtile: true
                code: 0
                cost: 1
                remain_money: 2201.695
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 公众号账号搜索和账号基本信息
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-463107539-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
